name: Aisha Okafor
title: Backend Engineer
summary: Backend specialist with deep Python expertise and a track record building high-reliability APIs at scale. Designed systems handling 10M+ daily requests. Passionate about observability, clean architecture, and mentoring junior engineers.

highlights: Designed inventory management API handling 10M+ daily requests with 99.98% uptime
Migrated monolithic Django app to service-oriented architecture, reducing deploy blast radius
Introduced async task processing with Celery + Redis, cutting order confirmation latency by 70%
Built data ingestion pipelines processing 500GB of partner data per day
Owned PostgreSQL query optimization work that reduced p95 latency from 800ms to 90ms
Contributed to internal tooling and REST API development
Wrote comprehensive test suites increasing coverage from 42% to 85%
